sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Republic Services Appoints New Director and Declares Dividend
feed.summary: Republic Services (RSG) announced the appointment of Ian Craig, CEO of Coca-Cola FEMSA, to its board of directors, increasing the board to 13 members and adding expertise in international, digital, and sustainability areas. Concurrently, the board declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.625 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 2, 2026. An AI analyst rates RSG as "Outperform," highlighting its financial performance and sustainability investments while noting potential overvaluation and challenges in recycling prices.

feed.title: XP Inc. Reshapes Control Structure as New Executives Join XP Control LLC
feed.summary: XP Inc. is reorganizing the ownership of its controlling entity, XP Control LLC, by adding senior executives Thiago Maffra and José Berenguer as voting partners and buying out three original partners' stakes. Despite a reduction in direct economic interest to 18% of Class A shares, XP Control LLC will maintain at least 69% of XP's voting power, with founder Guilherme Benchimol remaining the majority unitholder. This strategic realignment aims to enhance governance, stabilize the control structure, and support long-term value creation for stakeholders.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) Sets New 52-Week Low - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) shares hit a new 52-week low of $1,281.01 during trading. Despite the dip, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $2,071, indicating significant upside potential. The company's fundamentals showed a mixed picture, with a beat on quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, but recent insider stock sales.

feed.title: Zenas BioPharma (NASDAQ:ZBIO) Trading 13.8% Higher - What's Next?
feed.summary: Zenas BioPharma (NASDAQ:ZBIO) saw its stock price rise by 13.8% during trading, closing at $26.48 with reduced trading volume. Analysts have issued new price targets for ZBIO, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $43.14. Insider transactions show CEO Leon O. Moulder, Jr. recently increased his stake in the company.

feed.title: Federal Realty Trust Q4 earnings just miss, as comp POI growth slows (FRT:NYSE)
feed.summary: Federal Realty Trust (FRT) reported Q4 earnings that slightly missed Wall Street expectations in terms of core FFO per share, but revenue exceeded forecasts. The retail REIT saw a 1.7% dip in its stock during after-hours trading. Despite the slight miss, comparable portfolio occupancy and leased rates improved, and the company projects approximately 6% core FFO growth for the upcoming year.

feed.title: Columbus Circle Capital raises $230 million in IPO By Investing.com
feed.summary: Columbus Circle Capital Corp. II successfully completed its initial public offering, raising $230 million by selling 23 million units at $10 each, including units from the over-allotment option. The units, which began trading on Nasdaq on February 11, 2026, consist of Class A ordinary shares and redeemable warrants. Cohen & Company Capital Markets led the offering for the blank check company, which plans to pursue mergers or acquisitions.

feed.title: Ashford Hospitality Sells Houston Hotel, Reduces Debt Load
feed.summary: Ashford Hospitality Trust (AHT) recently sold its 150-room Embassy Suites Houston Near the Galleria for approximately $13.1 million in net cash proceeds. The majority of these proceeds, about $12.9 million, were used to reduce a mortgage loan covering 14 other hotels, contributing to a leaner balance sheet and a non-recurring gain. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates AHT as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite improving free cash flow and positive short-term technicals.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries shares jump as Q4 results top estimates By Investing.com
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) reported Q4 earnings and revenue that surpassed analyst expectations, causing its shares to rise 4% in after-hours trading. The company posted adjusted EPS of $2.00 on revenue of $2.7 billion, driven by productivity and restructuring efforts, despite market pricing pressures. Mohawk anticipates improved sales and earnings in Q1 2026 due to strengthening economies and lower mortgage rates.

feed.title: Columbus Circle Capital raises $230 million in IPO on NASDAQ
feed.summary: Columbus Circle Capital Corp. II (CMIIU) successfully completed its initial public offering, raising $230 million by selling 23 million units at $10 each, including an over-allotment option exercise. The company's units began trading on NASDAQ Global Market on February 11, 2026, with Class A ordinary shares and warrants expected to list separately later. This blank check company aims to pursue mergers or acquisitions, led by CEO Gary Quin and CFO Joseph W. Pooler, Jr.

feed.title: How FedEx plans to continue transformation, hit financial goals
feed.summary: During its Investor Day in Memphis, FedEx outlined its strategy for continued transformation and financial growth. The company plans to prioritize premium growth in high-margin sectors, enhance its digital and AI capabilities, and reshape its network to boost profits and stockholder value.

feed.title: Trump's FTC chairman chides Apple boss Tim Cook for content of Apple news feed
feed.summary: The chairman of the Federal Trade Commission, Andrew Ferguson, has written to Apple CEO Tim Cook to express concerns that Apple News is suppressing content from conservative news outlets. Ferguson's complaint follows a report by the Media Research Center alleging that the news feed disproportionately features "leftist" sources while omitting prominent conservative media. This criticism comes despite Cook's attendance at President Trump's second term inauguration.

feed.title: Public Storage forecast full-year core FFO below estimates, CEO Joe Russell to depart
feed.summary: Public Storage announced a full-year core FFO forecast that is below analyst estimates. Additionally, CEO Joe Russell is set to depart from the company. This news was reported by Refinitiv.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Issues $3.8 Billion Notes for Acquisition
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) has issued $3.8 billion in senior unsecured notes across four tranches to fund a portion of its acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. The company expects net proceeds of approximately $3.76 billion. While the immediate use is for the acquisition, funds may temporarily be allocated to general corporate purposes or short-term investments, demonstrating Thermo Fisher's strategy of using debt markets for strategic M&A and financial flexibility.

feed.title: $40M Tucows buyback to retire shares over the next year
feed.summary: Tucows Inc. (NASDAQ: TCX) has announced a new $40 million open-market stock buyback program, set to commence on February 13, 2026, and conclude by February 12, 2027. This program will involve repurchasing common shares via the Nasdaq Capital Market, with all acquired shares being retired and returned to treasury. The initiative follows the termination of a previous $40 million buyback program and will be funded through available working capital and existing credit facilities, with repurchases dependent on cash and market conditions.

feed.title: Coca-Cola FEMSA chief joins environmental services board with AI, sustainability focus
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. has appointed Ian Craig, CEO of Coca-Cola FEMSA, to its board of directors, expanding the board to 13 members. Craig brings extensive experience in digital transformation, sustainability initiatives like renewable energy and plastic bottle collection, and a strong background in mergers and acquisitions. His expertise is expected to significantly contribute to Republic Services' environmental stewardship, innovation, and strategic growth, particularly in AI-enabled capabilities.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. Appoints Ian Craig to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has appointed Ian Craig, CEO of Coca-Cola FEMSA, to its board of directors, expanding the board to 13 members with 12 independent directors. Craig brings extensive international business, operational, digital transformation, and sustainability expertise. His appointment is expected to bolster Republic Services' strategic growth, innovation, and environmental stewardship initiatives.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Appoints John Chidsey as CEO
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has appointed John W. Chidsey as its new President and CEO, replacing Harry Sommer. Chidsey brings extensive consumer-brand turnaround experience from Subway and Burger King, aiming to sharpen execution and strengthen financial performance. The company also reiterated its Q4 and full-year 2025 guidance, suggesting stable operational performance during this transition.

feed.title: Insider Sell: James Thompson Sells Shares of JB Hunt Transport S
feed.summary: James Thompson, a Director at JB Hunt Transport Services Inc (JBHT), sold 2,300 shares on February 11, 2026, and now owns 0.895 shares. This transaction is part of a larger trend of insider selling at JBHT, with 3 buys and 18 sells over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $230.75, which is considered modestly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $167.99.

feed.title: Dow (DOW) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $0.35/Share
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.35 per share, offering a forward yield of 4.29%. Despite this, the company faces significant financial challenges, including declining revenue, negative net margins, and an Altman Z-Score indicating a high risk of bankruptcy. Analyst sentiment is cautious, and technical indicators suggest the stock may be overbought.

feed.title: T-Mobile lines up €2.5B debt that may fund buybacks, dividends
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. announced that its subsidiary, T-Mobile USA, Inc., will sell €2.5 billion in euro-denominated senior notes across three tranches due in 2032, 2035, and 2038. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including potential share repurchases, dividends, and refinancing existing debt. The offering is expected to close on February 19, 2026.

feed.title: Allegion to Attend 2026 Barclays Industrial Select Conference
feed.summary: Allegion plc's President and CEO, John H. Stone, will discuss the company's long-term strategy at the 2026 Barclays Industrial Select Conference on February 19th. The conference will be held in Miami Beach, and a live webcast will be available for remote viewing. Allegion, known for its security and access solutions, reported $3.8 billion in revenue in 2024.

feed.title: LEVI & KORSINSKY, LLP: REVENUE GUIDANCE REDUCTION AND CUSTOMER IMPACT CHALLENGES AT ISSUE IN F5, INC. LITIGATION
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating a potential securities class action against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) following a significant decline in its share price. The decline reportedly stemmed from initial corrective disclosures related to an alleged security breach and a dramatic revision of F5's fiscal 2026 revenue guidance. The lawsuit focuses on alleged misrepresentations about operational challenges and the impact of the security incident on customer relationships and financial performance.

feed.title: Parker Scheduled to Present at Citi’s 2026 Global
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH) announced it will present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2026, at 11:20 a.m. Eastern time. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website. Parker Hannifin is a global leader in motion and control technologies, known for its long history of dividend increases.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries Inc. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $42 million, or 68 cents per share, which adjusted to $2 per share after non-recurring costs, exceeding Wall Street expectations. However, the flooring maker's revenue of $2.7 billion fell short of analyst forecasts. For the full year, the company posted a profit of $369.9 million on revenue of $10.79 billion.

feed.title: IT ALERT: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds Investors of an Investigation Involving Possible Securities Fraud Violations by Gartner, Inc.
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has launched an investigation into Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) for potential federal securities law violations. The probe focuses on Gartner's recent earnings release, which highlighted an EPS beat while revenue fell short and the 2026 outlook indicated a year-over-year decline. The investigation will also scrutinize the realism of previous EPS guidance and share-count assumptions, especially given the significant drop in Gartner's share price following the announcement.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Names Will Bonifant Group Vice President and Chief Supply Chain Officer
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has appointed Will Bonifant as Group Vice President and Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective March 9. Bonifant, previously with The Hershey Company, will oversee Hormel's global supply chain operations including procurement, manufacturing, and logistics. His appointment aims to strengthen the company's supply chain and support its long-term strategy, leveraging his extensive experience in complex global operations.

feed.title: Hershey supply chain executive, Navy vet to lead Hormel supply chain
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has appointed Will Bonifant as Group Vice President and Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective March 9, 2026. Bonifant joins Hormel from The Hershey Company, where he spent 15 years leading supply chain strategy, manufacturing, and engineering for a 20-plant network across various global markets. His background also includes management consulting and serving as a U.S. Navy submarine officer, bringing extensive experience in complex operations and global supply chain management to Hormel Foods.

feed.title: Aclaris at Guggenheim Summit: Strategic Biotech Developments By Investing.com
feed.summary: Aclaris Therapeutics, Inc. participated in the Guggenheim Securities Emerging Outlook: Biotech Summit 2026 to provide a strategic overview of its clinical trials and future plans. The company is advancing several drug candidates, including bosakitug and ATI-052 for atopic dermatitis and asthma, and ATI-2138, an ITK/JAK3 inhibitor, for potential use in alopecia and lichen planus. Aclaris aims for a "best-in-class" strategy, differentiating its offerings in a competitive market by focusing on superior efficacy and safety profiles, particularly with its selective ITK inhibitors.

feed.title: Citi Lifts CEO Fraser’s Pay 22% to $42 Million After Stock Surge
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. increased CEO Jane Fraser's pay by 22% to $42 million for 2025, making her one of the highest-paid banking executives in the U.S. This rise follows a year where Citigroup's stock surged by 66%, outperforming other Wall Street banks. Fraser's new compensation package is only $1 million less than that of JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s CEO, Jamie Dimon.

feed.title: (FRT) Federal Realty Investment Trust Expects 2026 Core FFO Per Share Range $7.42-$7.52, vs. FactSet Est of $7.39
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) projects its 2026 Core FFO (Funds From Operations) per share to be between $7.42 and $7.52. This forecast surpasses FactSet's estimate of $7.39. The company's stock, FRT, was trading at $104.75 with a 5-day change of +1.11% as of 5:08 PM EST on February 12, 2026.

feed.title: BAXTER INTERNATIONAL INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. released its 2025 10-K report, detailing a 6% increase in total net sales to $11,244 million but also reporting a net loss of $(957) million attributable to stockholders due to significant special items and impairments. The company is actively streamlining operations through divestitures like its Kidney Care and BioPharma Solutions businesses to focus on core segments and reduce debt, while facing challenges from heavy indebtedness, market competition, supply chain disruptions, and management transitions. Baxter plans to continue optimizing its portfolio, pursue cost savings, and manage its financial position to improve future growth and profitability.

feed.title: Quiet Excellence: 25 Years of CBIZ Alternative Investment Know-How
feed.summary: CBIZ's Alternative Investment Group celebrates 25 years of providing consistent, high-quality audit and tax support. The article highlights the evolution of their services from traditional compliance to advisory, emphasizing their boutique approach, technological advancements, and collaborative team integration. It also shares client anecdotes demonstrating the value of early intervention and reliable service delivery in the alternative investments sector.

feed.title: ROLLINS INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. (ROL) has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing robust financial and operational performance with $3,761.05 million in revenues, an 11.0% increase from 2024, and a net income per share of $1.09. The company highlighted strong growth across residential, commercial, and termite services, strategic acquisitions, and talent development initiatives like "People First." Despite economic challenges and cybersecurity risks, Rollins anticipates 7% to 8% organic revenue growth for 2026, supported by core pest control markets and a disciplined acquisition strategy.

feed.title: FIS (NYSE:FIS) Growth Levers Explained Through Sector Dynamics Across Russell 1000 Peers
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) operates in the diversified financial services sector, providing technology solutions to banks, capital markets, and merchant clients globally. Despite a recent share decline, the company's projected annual revenue expansion is expected to outpace the broader diversified financial sector. The article highlights FIS's growth levers through an analysis of its sector dynamics among Russell 1000 peers.

feed.title: Avantor, Inc. (NYSE:AVTR) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Avantor, Inc. (NYSE:AVTR) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, missing EPS expectations. The company is undergoing a "Revival" program, reorganizing into two new business units: VWR distribution and services, and bioscience and medtech products, to sharpen strategic focus and improve execution. Avantor anticipates 2026 to be a year of transition and investment, with expected organic revenue growth of -2.5% to -0.5% and adjusted EPS of 77¢ to 83¢.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Announces $750 Million Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. announced a $750 million senior notes offering due in 2036, with notes priced at 99.679% and a 5.25% interest rate. The proceeds will be used to repay borrowings from its commercial paper program. The offering is expected to close around February 25, 2026, and is not contingent on the completion of a tender offer.

feed.title: Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. to Participate in Upcoming Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference
feed.summary: Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. (NYSE: GRDN) announced its participation in the upcoming Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on Monday, March 2, at 1:40 p.m. Eastern Time. The company, a leading long-term care pharmacy services provider, will make a presentation that will be accessible via a live audio webcast and a 90-day replay. Guardian Pharmacy Services manages over 50 pharmacies nationwide, serving nearly 204,000 residents in long-term care facilities.

feed.title: EBay Live launches in Canada, bringing real-time, community-driven shopping nationwide
feed.summary: EBay Live has launched in Canada, aiming to introduce real-time, community-driven shopping across the nation. This expansion brings eBay's interactive shopping experience to a new market, building on its existing global marketplace operations. The move is part of eBay's broader strategy to enhance seller and buyer engagement through live platforms.

feed.title: Public Storage (PSA) Announces Leadership Changes and Office Relocation
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has announced significant leadership changes and a relocation of its principal office from Glendale, California, to Frisco, Texas. Joseph D. Russell, Jr., President and CEO, will retire on March 31, 2026, and H. Thomas Boyle will succeed him as CEO. Additionally, Joseph D. Fisher will become President and CFO, and other key leadership promotions and board changes will take effect.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) Announces Earnings Results
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) reported mixed Q4 earnings, with adjusted EPS of $2.00 and revenue of $2.70 billion, both slightly beating consensus estimates. However, GAAP net income significantly declined to $42 million from $90 million year-over-year, highlighting a disparity between adjusted and reported earnings. The company's stock traded down following the announcement and analyst downgrades, with insiders also selling shares recently.

feed.title: Cardinal Health Board of Directors Approves Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Cardinal Health's Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.5107 per share. This dividend will be payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders registered by April 1, 2026. The company is a major distributor and manufacturer of pharmaceutical, medical, and laboratory products, dedicated to improving healthcare through innovative solutions.

feed.title: CORNING INC /NY SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Corning Inc. has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, highlighting a year of significant financial growth with net sales rising by 19% to $15,629 million and core net income increasing by 29%. The company saw strong performance in optical communications driven by generative AI demand and introduced new products and expanded manufacturing capabilities globally. Looking ahead, Corning's Springboard plan aims for $4 billion in incremental core sales by 2026, targeting sustained growth despite market and operational risks.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group announces proposed offering of senior unsecured notes
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has announced a proposed offering of senior unsecured notes. This news follows a recent filing by Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. for a two-part senior notes offering, though the size was not disclosed. The cruise company also recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.50 per share from $1.00.

feed.title: GARTNER INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Gartner Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing a 4% increase in revenue to $6,497 million, driven by growth in Insights and Conferences segments, but noting a 42% decrease in net income to $729 million due to a goodwill impairment loss. The report outlines strategic initiatives like the sale of its Digital Markets business and significant share repurchases, while also addressing challenges including intense competition, evolving technology risks (especially AI), and macroeconomic uncertainties.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper adds two independent directors, restructures board committees
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) is adding two independent directors, Amie Thuener and William Newlands, to its board and restructuring its committee organization, effective March 2. This move comes as the company prepares for the closing of its JDE Peet's acquisition and a subsequent separation into two independent companies. Thuener will join the Audit & Finance Committee, while Newlands will serve on the newly created Nominating & Governance Committee, separating the previous Remuneration & Nominating Committee into two distinct bodies.

feed.title: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) Announces Earnings Results, Misses Estimates By $0.22 EPS
feed.summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) reported quarterly earnings of $3.10 per share, falling short of analysts' consensus estimates by $0.22. Following the announcement, the stock traded down, with shares hitting $227.24 on heavy volume. Several analysts have updated their price targets and ratings on EXPE, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $292.23.

feed.title: Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) Beats Expectations in Strong Q4 CY2025
feed.summary: Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) reported better-than-expected Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue up 11.4% year-on-year to $3.55 billion and non-GAAP profit exceeding analyst estimates by 12.2%. The company also provided strong next-quarter revenue guidance, surpassing analyst expectations. Despite strong financial performance, shares traded down slightly after the report.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ES) Eversource Energy Posts Q4 Adjusted EPS $1.12 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $1.10
feed.summary: Eversource Energy (ES) announced its Q4 adjusted EPS at $1.12 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $1.10. The company also reported Q4 revenue of $3.37 billion, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $2.71 billion. This news is accompanied by recent analyst price target adjustments and dividend raises for the utility company.

feed.title: Cardinal Health to pay $0.5107 dividend per share on April 15
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) announced its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.5107 per share. This dividend is payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 1, 2026, and will be paid out of the company's capital surplus. This action aligns with the company's established pattern of consistent, slightly rising shareholder distributions.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals's (NASDAQ:VRTX) Q4 CY2025: Beats On Revenue
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) reported Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue of $3.19 billion, beating analyst expectations by 1.1% and growing 9.5% year-on-year. Despite the revenue beat, the company's non-GAAP EPS of $5.03 missed consensus estimates by 2.3%. The stock remained flat immediately after the report, and the article suggests evaluating longer-term fundamentals and valuation for investment decisions.
